locator.quote: C3 (lay-pwin) and C4 (race confidence) regressed in Round 1 on the

text: C3 (lay-pwin) and C4 (race confidence) regressed in Round 1 on the weak baseline; Round 5 re-tests them on the strong base.

locator.quote: weak baseline. With Round 5's strong base, the lay-side gates may

text: With Round 5's strong base, the lay-side gates may finally bite — the 'remove bad lays' mechanism could compose with BC's selection lift.
